instructions.instruction: Generate a root configuration that centralises remote_state and provider generate blocks for DRY reuse.
Use dependency blocks with mock_outputs so plans work before dependencies are applied.
NEVER use a dynamic reference in a feature-flag default; feature-flag defaults must be static.
NEVER duplicate backend configuration in every child; inherit it from the root via include.
Pin the Terraform source in each child terragrunt.hcl to a versioned ref.
Validate generated configurations with the terragrunt-validator skill before finishing.
